title: lolium multiflorum var. rigidum
intro: Lolium multiflorum var. rigidum, commonly known as rigid ryegrass or Italian ryegrass, is a type of perennial grass belonging to the Poaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Lolium multiflorum var. rigidum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal agent.
